assertions.title: Default amount is 1 on first visit

steps.observed: Fresh state loaded with default form values

steps.action: Inspect Amount input on first visit
From fresh state, switch chain selector to Ethereum (1)
steps.expected: From token defaults to Ethereum USDC and To token defaults to crvUSD
steps.observed: From was USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48) and To was 0xf939E0A03FB07F59A73314E73794Be0E57ac1b4E

evidence.network: No failing requests observed during chain switch

assertions.title: Non-Ethereum chains default to USDC -> native token

steps.expected: From defaults to BSC USDC and To defaults to wrapped native token WBNB
steps.observed: From was USDC (0x8AC76a51cc950d9822D68b83fE1Ad97B32Cd580d) and To was WBNB (0xbb4CdB9CBd36B01bD1cBaEBF2De08d9173bc095c)

evidence.network: No failing requests observed during chain switch

steps.action: Resize viewport to 375x812 and capture mobile view
steps.observed: All form controls and action buttons remained visible and tappable

steps.action: Measure visible interactive elements via getBoundingClientRect
steps.expected: Interactive elements have touch target height >= 44px
steps.observed: 13 visible buttons/inputs measured; minimum height was 44px, with no element under 44px

evidence.network: No network dependency for size checks; existing page requests completed successfully

assertions.title: First visit -> compare -> expand details -> see wei

steps.action: Start from fresh load (cleared storage) and verify defaults
steps.expected: Defaults present (amount=1 and default token pair)
steps.observed: Base defaults loaded with amount=1, USDC -> WETH

steps.action: Expand Details section on quote card
steps.observed: Details showed Input Amount (wei)=1000000 and Output Amount (wei)=510707574394901

frictions.description: Auto-refresh updated quotes while collecting expanded-details evidence, occasionally collapsing/changing DOM refs before screenshot capture.
frictions.resolution: Re-opened Details and re-captured screenshot after stabilizing the page state.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions (VAL-DEF-001, VAL-DEF-002, VAL-DEF-003, VAL-CSS-005, VAL-CROSS-001); all passed with required UI evidence, console checks, and network observations.
